page_content:
MUSC812 Doctoral Opera Techniques II (2 Credits)

Continuation of MUSC811. Techniques for opera preformance: Scene Study II; Acting Il; Movement Il: Stage Combat |; and Mask; and methodology seminar.

Prerequisite: MUSC811; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC612 or MUSC812.
